steps: %s %s Ingredients Quantity Bacto tryptone 20g NaCl 10g Double distilled H2O up to 2L
%s %s 1 Dissolve Bacto tryptone and NaCl in 1L double distilled H2O in a 2L measuring cylinder 2 Make up to final volume using double distilled H2O 3 Aliquot, label and autoclave
